summary: Iteration 68 - Avatar Language and Voice Persistence Verification PASSED. All requested features verified: (1) Backend API for avatars correctly saves and returns language field, (2) Voice data persists correctly (both custom and OpenAI voice types), (3) Frontend Edit Avatar modal has all expected UI elements: Clothing/360° View/Voice tabs, Language selector (PT/EN/ES), Save as New and Update buttons.

minor.issue: Transient 500 error during test (network/connection issue, retry succeeded)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Avatar language and voice persistence fully working. Backend API at /api/data/avatars correctly includes language field in both POST (save) and GET (list) responses. Frontend Edit Avatar modal at /marketing/studio correctly displays: (1) Three tabs: Clothing, 360° View, Voice; (2) Language selector with PT/EN/ES buttons; (3) Save as New and Update buttons when editing existing avatar; (4) Voice tab shows AI Voice Bank and Custom Recording options with audio player for recorded voice.
